arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals Aston Villa transfer truth and explains why he was 'surprised'
arts.sum: Villa won home and away agains the Hatters last term, but Emery liked what he saw from Barkley when preparing for the matches. Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has revealed Ross Barkley emerged as a transfer target for him when he analysed Luton Town before facing Rob Edwards' side last season.

arts.ttl: Report: How Benoit Badiashile feels about staying at Chelsea after receiving approaches from several clubs
arts.sum: He's currently behind Colwill and Fofana in the pecking order.

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs Aston Villa: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: Blues out to continue fine start to the season

arts.ttl: 'I lived with Chelsea star Nicolas Jackson and got him sent off after throwing a chair'
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW: Former Barcelona youth starlet Iker Goujon was "inseparable" from Chelsea attacker Nicolas Jackson during their time together at Villarreal and both he and former Mirandes coach Pablo Gomez Rubio, who worked with the 23-year-old during a loan spell, are not surprised by the Senegal international's exciting evolution

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca not starting 'fantastic' Chelsea player against Aston Villa would be so unjust - opinion
arts.sum: He deserves a shot in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca boosted by huge Josh Acheampong transfer update after Chelsea contract talks
arts.sum: Chelsea have held positive talks with Josh Acheampong over signing a new contract with the club, sources have told football.london . On Friday evening, Acheampong was included in the match day squad for Chelsea's Development team's win over Derby County - that was the first time the teenager has been involved for the club on a competitive level since the end of September.

arts.ttl: Levi Colwill makes four-word Chelsea admission and makes Enzo Maresca fear factor confession
arts.sum: Colwill, who has become an established England international this season because of his form, has played every single minute in the Premier League in 2024/25. "It's due to the manager," Colwill replied when asked where the Chelsea 'chaos' has gone this season.

arts.ttl: Conor Gallagher has made an interesting prediction about Chelsea
arts.sum: Conor Gallagher is still secretly a blue...

arts.ttl: 'I handed failing ex-Chelsea star a Champion League lifeline and it's paying off'
arts.sum: Aston Villa signed Ross Barkley in the summer as Unai Emery placed his faith in the former Everton and Chelsea midfielder after seeing him perform for Luton Town last season

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Aston Villa: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea host Aston Villa on Sunday afternoon in the Premier League. Preview includes how to watch on TV, team news, predicted lineups and score prediction.
